## [09:05 - 12:06]

My Product Launch Formula is the number one selling product ever in that market to my knowledge. And I have a pretty wide ranging, just to get some of my position in the industry. So now one of the things is, since I've been doing business online since 96, I've known or I've met and I've known, be friended, literally thousands of online entrepreneurs. And the one thing that virtually all the most successful people have in common is that they have their own products that they're selling. Now don't get me wrong, there's lots and lots of ways to make money online. Online business can, there's just all different kinds of different models. I know people that have done really, really well selling advertising with AdSense, affiliate market. I have a friend who's, you know, done millions of dollars in affiliate marketing. All of those methods work really well. And in reality, you want to have multiple streams of revenue in your business. But at the core of your business, you're going to want to have your own product. And here's why. With your own product, you can control your own destiny. No one can take your product away. No one can change the agreements. No one can pull the product off the market after you've set up a marketing campaign. No one can change the product quality or the price or the offer. They can't go out of business on you. They can't decide not to pay you if it's your product, you own the product, you have control. For instance, you know, if you're in affiliate marketing, well, and I'll just talk about that for a minute because a lot of people, they start off in affiliate marketing. That's a great way to do it. I'm a big fan of teaching people to start in affiliate marketing and then move into their own products. And there are a lot of great things about affiliate marketing. You know, it's super easy to get started. It's cheap. There's almost no investment. It's fast. You don't have to go through the predication time or the costs. It's flexible. There's almost no technology involved. You don't do any customer service. All you do is you drive traffic and you collect a check. But in the end, when you've put together basically an affiliate marketing business, you have yourself a moneymaker. It's not a business. This is a key distinction. You have a way to drive some revenue into your business, but your business is completely dependent on someone else and on their product. And they're the ones that are building the list. They're the ones that are building the client list.

## [12:07 - 13:50]

You know, having a moneymaker is nice. I mean, it's great. I like making money as much as the next guy, but those moneymakers don't last. They might last a while, but they go away eventually. So in your business, you want to build assets. And your list is the most important asset in your business. Actually, there's multiple lists. You'll have all different kinds of lists. You'll have prospect lists. You'll have JV lists. You'll have affiliate lists. You'll have client lists. Client lists are the most important. In my experience, client lists are worth about 15 times. Or someone, a person on your client list is going to be worth 15 times what someone on your prospect list is worth. That, of course, that number, the 15 times, that's my experience in several of my businesses. It will vary depending on you and your business and your market and your products and your follow-up and all kinds of things. But it's a big difference between a client and a prospect. And when you have your own products, then you're building a client list. So when you have your own product, you have control.
